hooks.description: Declare the repositories that TeaTree should provision for this overlay.
hooks.name: get_repos

hooks.description: Return the ordered setup steps for a newly created worktree.
hooks.name: get_provision_steps

hooks.description: Add overlay-specific environment variables to the generated worktree env file.
hooks.name: get_env_extra

hooks.description: Expose named service commands for lifecycle start and operator discovery.
hooks.name: get_run_commands

hooks.description: Describe how a worktree database should be provisioned or restored.
hooks.name: get_db_import_strategy

hooks.description: Return callbacks to run after database setup completes.
hooks.name: get_post_db_steps

hooks.description: Declare extra symlinks that should exist inside the worktree.
hooks.name: get_symlinks

hooks.description: Return additional service metadata for lifecycle orchestration.
hooks.name: get_services_config

hooks.description: Return merge-request validation problems for this overlay.
hooks.name: validate_mr

hooks.description: Return the active overlay skill path and any companion skills.
hooks.name: get_skill_metadata

settings.description: Import path for the active OverlayBase subclass.
settings.name: TEATREE_OVERLAY_CLASS

settings.description: Runtime key for unattended SDK execution.
settings.name: TEATREE_SDK_RUNTIME

settings.description: Runtime key for interactive user-input work.
settings.name: TEATREE_INTERACTIVE_RUNTIME

settings.description: Terminal strategy used by the interactive runtime.
settings.name: TEATREE_TERMINAL_MODE

skill_metadata_fields.description: Additional skills loaded alongside the primary overlay skill.
skill_metadata_fields.name: companion_skills
